title: Internal Cross-references
full_text:
1.3.1.4 Internal Cross-references
Internal Cross-references
1) Where the Division of a referenced provision is not specified in this Code, it shall
mean that the referenced provision is in the same Division as the referencing provision.

sentences.text: Where the Division of a referenced provision is not specified in this Code, it shall mean that the referenced provision is in the same Division as the referencing provision.
